name: Database Migration
features: bill_checkins table for open bill check-ins
bills table alterations (bill_type, status, photo_url, chat_message_id)
Supabase Realtime for chat_messages and bill_checkins

success_criteria.description: Migration SQL file creates chat_messages table with correct columns and types
Migration SQL creates bill_checkins with unique constraint on (bill_id, member_id) when member_id not null
bills table gets bill_type (default 'standard'), status (default 'active'), photo_url, chat_message_id columns
RLS policies: chat_messages viewable/insertable by group members only
RLS policies: bill_checkins viewable by auth, insertable by group members, deletable by bill creator
TypeScript interfaces in types.ts match all new/modified tables
Indexes exist for chat_messages(group_id, created_at) and bill_checkins(bill_id)
Existing bills unaffected — bill_type defaults to 'standard', status defaults to 'active'

edge_cases: Guest check-in: member_id is null, guest_name must be provided
Unique constraint on bill_checkins should allow multiple guest entries (member_id null)
chat_messages.content can be plain text OR JSON string for card payloads
Migration must be idempotent (add column IF NOT EXISTS)
constraints: Must be a single SQL migration file: 005-chat-and-open-bills.sql
Must not break existing data or queries
RLS must use auth.uid() pattern consistent with existing policies
